issue: Backend task "add queue job" pulls 10 rules including the entire React/Vite/Tailwind/Storybook/TanStack frontend pattern set. A Laravel queue job needs Laravel + phpunit; React rules are irrelevant.
expected: Backend Laravel task should narrow to haus.laravel-patterns (+ phpunit-patterns only if the task implies testing).
rootCauseHypothesis: Keyword filter finds no token hit so it falls back to all medium/high-confidence rules, ignoring that the task is clearly backend ("queue job"). No ecosystem-isolation step trims frontend rules when the task is backend-only.
resolvedByTest: tests/cross-bleed.test.js (laravel-with-react-frontend / add queue job rejects frontend rules)
